exam_format: Closed-book multiple-choice exam taken after an approved instructor-led course. Live-stream and in-person certification available.

testing_centers.provider: Prometric (on behalf of IICRC), via IICRC Approved Schools / Instructors
testing_centers.notes: Certification requires completing an IICRC-approved course delivered by a registered instructor, then passing the closed-book exam administered by Prometric. Some courses offer live-stream delivery. Certifications are internationally recognized and portable.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID matching registration; proof of approved-course completion. IICRC registration number used for certification issuance.
exam_rules: Closed-book, multiple-choice exams administered by Prometric. Exams test application of the relevant IICRC ANSI standard (e.g., S500 water, S520 mold, S540 trauma, S700 fire & smoke, S100 carpet, S300 upholstery).
renewal_options: Maintained via Continuing Education Credits (CECs) — generally 4 CECs every 4 years per active certification — plus payment of the annual IICRC certification renewal fee. Lapsed certifications may require re-examination.
recommended_experience: Required for Master Water Restorer designation

retake_policy.notes: Retakes available; full exam fee and scheduling via Prometric/approved school per their policy.

official_study_resources.title: IICRC Approved Courses (via registered Schools/Instructors)
official_study_resources.notes: Mandatory instructor-led course is the primary preparation; exam follows the course.

official_study_resources.title: IICRC ANSI Standards (S500, S520, S540, S700, S100, S300, etc.)
official_study_resources.notes: Exams test application of the relevant published IICRC standard.
